customAttributes.description: Once per turn, during your Main Phase, if you control this monster on the field, you can equip it to your Vampire Orchis as an Equip Spell Card, OR change it back to a monster in face-up Attack Position. When equipped to a monster by this card''s effect, each time that monster destroys 1 of your opponent''s monsters, Special Summon 1 Wicked Plant Token (Plant-Type/EARTH/1 Star/ATK 800/DEF 800) in Attack or Defense Position. (1 monster can only be equipped with 1 Union Monster at a time. If the monster that this card is eqipped to is destroyed in battle, this card is destroyed instead.)
